reviews.review_description: Game is extremely good, but I’m scared to go out of the spawn point because no one plays the game anymore unfortunately ￼
This game has to be more popular and ITS SO GOOD

Tbh it is a good game but i read the message is said something talking about "i hate july 3rd" or "please dont die" and "losers naned xyle" or other messages like "i thought you had the answers" or "oh darling now your gone" and "you should know right from wrong" and on the green board it says "what do you mean" and on the computer it just says "fu*king heartless" which is sad idk if this is a way to vent but through a game but idk what happened and the other messages on the computer it says "youcausedhissuic*de" which is also sad tbh but again hope the owner is ok and tbh seeing the message on the computer for credits is sad dude :( but i get that people barely even play it but still its just sad to see these messages dude  :(
Best horror game oat but the game needs more people (if you want to play with me then in the game join the code JJC.
Me and my friend played this and it was fun I highly recommend with friends
